2950767.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2950767.description: Miguel invites Chippy, a cute chipmunk-like creature, to join him and Felicity on their friend-iversary, but Chippy isn't all she seems! // Felicity tries a little too hard to be purr-fect and somehow loses both her powers and her confidence.

2950825.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2950825.description: The friends join a scouting group but Felicity has a hard time winning the praise of her scoutmaster. // When Moona announces she's closing Mythic Malts, Felicity tries to get Moona to fall back in love with her job, but the plan backfires.

2972003.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2972003.description: Felicity and Miguel rescue a prince named Denzel who's been imprisoned by his evil brother, Prince Larry. // When Felicity loses her favorite toy, she and her friends have to retrieve it from the yard of her dreaded neighbor, the Meanotaur.

2972059.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2972059.description: Felicity and Miguel attend a costume party at The Palace of the Perfect where they end up in a fight to take back some stolen powers. // Yana's invited to a fancy society event, but she's afraid she'll make a fool of herself.

3009225.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3009225.description: While getting ready for a big dance competition, Felicity starts having nightmares about the Boogie Man. // In order to help Miguel win the "Golden Ladle" prize in Mythlandia's annual cook-off competition, Felicity buys him a bag of magic beans.

3009296.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3009296.description: It's Eggtober and Rudy is scared everyone will discover he's lying about being related to the Easter Bunny. // Felicity and Miguel are stuck together by magical friendship bracelets that will only unlock if they prove they're really best friends.

3017873.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3017873.description: Felicity is overwhelmed by the responsibility of owning her first pet, a cute but mischievous creature called a Winky. // Athena loses her confidence when, for the first time ever, she gets a fact about Mythlandia wrong.

3017942.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3017942.description: Felicity is questioning what she's meant to be when she baby-sits a little changeling girl, struggling with the same issue. // When Felicity comes to the aid of a stinky stranger named Rip Van Stinkle, he vows to be at her beck and call for life.

3027226.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3027226.description: Felicity pulls a legendary talking sword named "Excali-Burt" from a stone and is rewarded with her own magical castle. // Rudy begs Mighty Meow and Super Lucha to give him a shot at being their sidekick.

3027282.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3027282.description: Felicity calls a magic, but mischievous, pixie to make her malts delicious. // Felicity's new pen has a way with words, making them a reality.

2985882.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2985882.description: Yana eats a cookie to level up her smarts, but realizes it's her heart that makes her special. // Miguel learns a new trick, which gets him completely lost.

2985952.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2985952.description: Felicity helps a mashup creature to realize his true potential. // To avoid a visit to Dr. Lotzashots, Felicity borrows Father Time's watch.

3013246.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3013246.description: Felicity worries that her powers won't measure up at a party for the most powerful and popular citizens in Mythlandia. // An ancient Anubis king tests Miguel to see if he's ready to leave Mythlandia and become the next ruler.

3034979.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3034979.description: Felicity brings Miguel to Catlantic City, where Miguel is locked up in the pound for being a dog. // Felicity, Miguel, Yana and Athena have to cross Phobia Forest to cash in coupons for free cupcakes.

3053673.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3053673.description: Yana eats a witch's apple and instantly falls asleep so Felicity and Miguel have to find a way to break the spell. // Felicity is having fun at her party, she convinces the Sand Crab Man to take the night off, which causes chaos in Mythlandia.

3053735.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3053735.description: Felicity can't decide what to do for the Mythlandia Talent Contest while Miguel channels his guitar skills. // Felicity creates a rainbow, causing a leprechaun named Paddy to appear.

3074290.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3074290.description: Miguel is so messy that a creature named the Loch Mess Monster moves in with him. // Felicity and Miguel pretend to be real super heroes, drawing the wrath of a notorious super villain named The Couch Potato.

3074346.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3074346.description: Felicity and friends find a magic wand, which they use to make crazy wishes until they can locate the wand's rightful owner. // When Miguel discovers his favorite malt is now on the kids menu, he drinks from The Fountain of Youth to get younger.

3090880.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3090880.description: Bug Felicity discovers her favorite snack has been sabotaged so she takes matters into her own hands by visiting the Snacktory. // The Backwards Bug bites Miguel and Athena, causing them to speak backwards until their friends can find the cure.

3090942.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3090942.description: Miguel invites Chippy, a cute chipmunk-like creature, to join him and Felicity on their friend-iversary, but Chippy isn't all she seems! // Felicity tries a little too hard to be purr-fect and somehow loses both her powers and her confidence.
